---
id: get-v-1-account-account-mailboxes
title: "List mailboxes"
description: "Lists all available mailboxes"
sidebar_label: "List mailboxes"

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List mailboxes"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/account/{account}/mailboxes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Lists all available mailboxes

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-ee-timeout","in":"header","schema":{"type":"integer","description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)","minimum":0,"maximum":7200000},"description":"Request timeout in milliseconds (overrides EENGINE_TIMEOUT environment variable)"},{"name":"account","in":"path","schema":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier for the email account","example":"user123","maxLength":256,"x-convert":{"trim":true}},"description":"Unique identifier for the email account","required":true},{"name":"counters","in":"query","schema":{"type":"boolean","description":"If true, then includes message counters in the response","default":false},"description":"If true, then includes message counters in the response"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"mailboxes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"path":{"type":"string","description":"Full path to the mailbox","example":"Kalender/S&APw-nnip&AOQ-evad"},"delimiter":{"type":"string","description":"Hierarchy delimiter character used in paths","example":"/"},"parentPath":{"type":"string","description":"Path to the parent mailbox","example":"Kalender"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Display name of the mailbox","example":"Sünnipäevad"},"listed":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether this mailbox appears in LIST command results","example":true},"subscribed":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether the user is subscribed to this mailbox","example":true},"specialUse":{"type":"string","description":"Special folder type (Inbox, Sent, Drafts, etc.)","example":"\\Sent","enum":["\\All","\\Archive","\\Drafts","\\Flagged","\\Junk","\\Sent","\\Trash","\\Inbox"],"title":"MailboxSpecialUse"},"specialUseSource":{"type":"string","description":"How the special use was determined: \"user\" (set via API), \"extension\" (server-provided), or \"name\" (guessed from folder name)","example":"extension","enum":["user","extension","name"],"title":"MailboxSpecialUseSource"},"noInferiors":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether this mailbox can contain child mailboxes","example":false},"messages":{"type":"integer","description":"Total number of messages in the mailbox","example":120},"uidNext":{"type":"integer","description":"Next UID value that will be assigned","example":121},"status":{"type":"object","description":"Additional mailbox statistics","properties":{"messages":{"type":"integer","description":"Message count from STATUS command","example":120},"unseen":{"type":"integer","description":"Unread message count from STATUS command","example":120}},"title":"MailboxResponseStatus"}},"required":["path","parentPath","name"],"title":"MailboxResponseItem"},"title":"MailboxesList"}},"title":"MailboxesFilterResponse"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
